description: Composition Grey melange round neck sleeveless t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has grunge look lettering on the front and brand name on the back behind the collar Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use a mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Wram iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get a fresh dose of attitude with this grey melange sleeveless T-shirt from probase. The grunge look graphic lettering on the front saying" music screams the words we are all too afraid to speak" gives this tee an edgy vibe. Team this with low slung jeans and sneakers for a street-wise look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
